titleStmt.title: SII 11.151: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 151. (B.K. No. 8 of 1927-28.) BEḶVAṆKI, ROṆ TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A BROKEN SLAB LYING CLOSE TO THE TEMPLE OF KALAMĒŚVARA.

summary.p: This slightly damaged inscription of the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva (Vikramāditya VI) records the gift of land made by Palageya Chāvuṇḍamayya and his wife Sāntikabbe for the upkeep of the sabhā-maṇṭapa and the tank Muttalageṟe constructed by them, to the Eighty-Four Mahājanas of the agrahāra village Beḷvaṇige, headed by the Ūroḍeya Vishṇu-Bhaṭṭōpādhyāya. The epigraph was engraved by Taila.
The record is dated Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 27, Chitrabhānu, Pushya, puṇṇami, Thursday. The date corresponds to A.D. 1102, December 25, Thursday, on which day puṇṇami commenced at ·27.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyana mūlastaṁbāya śaṁbhavē . ©
namastasmai varāhāya līlayācaratē mahīṁ khurāṁtaragatō yasya mēruḥ khaṇakhaṇāyatē ©
© svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara para
mabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattribhuvanama
lladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhi pravarddhamāna mācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ salu ttamire .
vṛtta . Esevu beḷvalaṁ śōbhisugu taddēśadoḷ beḷvaṇi
ge yesegu mā dēśvaraṁ śrī maḷareṇbattanālvardvijare śrē
ṣṭhaṁ samu . kaṁda . ḍa mṛtakara
beḷagida nī tribhuvanamalla peṁpene dhavaḷacū
. svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamaunānuṣṭhānaparāyaṇaja
pasamādhiśīḷasaṁpannaruṁ sakaḷavēdavēdā gamar . Agniṣṭōmādyanēka
yajñāvabhṛthāvagāhanapavitrīkṛtagātrar tātithipitṛdēvatādvija samāja
r . śrīpādārādhanatatparar . Āśritajanakaḷpabhūjar . śaraṇāgata
vajrapaṁjarar . śrīvallabhadēvapādāṁbujārādhanar nāmādi samastapraśastisahita śrīmada
grahāraṁ beḷvaṇige yūroḍeya śrīviṣṇubhaṭṭōpādhyāyapramukha mahājanareṇbatta nālva
ra śrīpādapadmōpajīvi . kanda . kuladiṁ guṇadiṁ lalitadhairyyasatyavākyadiṁ kaliyugado
ḷ sale tāne yenisi negaḻdaṁ palageya cāvuṇḍamayya nurvvītaḷadoḷ . Ātana kulavanita guṇavrā
tānvite dharmmamūrtti patibhaktige vikhyātiyarundhatige mahījātege dore sāntikabbeyeṁbaḷ pesariṁ . Intu
vikhyātiyiṁ nagaḻdapalageya cāvuṇḍamayyaṁ yyana dharmmapatni sāntikabbeyu miḻdu tamma mā
ḍisida sabhāmaṁṭapakka vagaḷisida muttalageṟega vanteraḍaṟa khaṇḍasphuṭitajīrṇnōddhārakke . svasti śrīma
ccāḷukyavikramavarṣada 27 neya citrabhānusaṁvatsarada puṣyada puṇnamiyuṁ bṛhaspativāramu mu
ttarāyaṇasaṁkrāṁtiyuṁ kūḍidaṁdina puṇyatithiyoḷ muttalageṟeya pattida baḍagal piriyakōlal
biṭṭa mattareraḍu Intī bhūmiya nūroḍeyapramukha mahājanaveṇbhattanālvaru sarvva bādhāparihāra
mācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ pratipāḷisuvar . mattamintī dharmmama purassararāgi naḍeyisida mahāpuruṣa
kurukṣētra prayāge vāraṇāsiyargghyatīrtthadoḷ caturvvēdapāragarappa brāhmaṇargge sahasrakavile
ya naḷaṁkārasahitamāgi koṭṭa puṇyamintī dharmmama naḷidavargge kurukṣētra prayāge vāraṇāsiyargghya
tīrtthaṁgaḷoḷ caturvvēdapāragarappa brāhmarumaṁ sahasrakavileyuma naḷida
ntīmāḍida dharmmamanantavarggaḷa putri kaṁcikabbeya tanayaṁ santatadiṁdaṁ naḍapuva nintī
basava . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhā kṛmiḥ . sāmā
nyōyaṁ dharmmasēturnṛpāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ sarvvānētānbhāvinaḥ pārtthivēṁdrānbhūyō bhūyō
yācatē rāmabhadraḥ . © maravesadoḷ kalvesadoḷ varapatracchēda rmmaṁgaḷoḷuṁ dore viśvakarmmanuḷida
śrīsūtradhāri barmmanoḷentu . Ātana magana magaṁ vikhyā
śrī rijātāvallabhapadasarōjabhṛṅgaṁ taila . svastiśrīmadagra
ja na marmma noḷpiṁgārmma sarasatigaṇamitra paranārīputra .
bhāsvanta neṇbhattanālvara vidyāvanta śrīmatsūtradhāri
Digital edition of SII 11.151 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
